task_completion.description: The agent updated the display name to 'Capt. Rodriguez | LAX' and position to 'Captain' in the Flight Crew View Settings.
task_completion.visual_evidence: In the Flight Crew View Settings screen, the display name field shows 'Capt. Rodriguez | LAX' and the Position field shows 'Captain'.

task_completion.description: The agent configured both the Home Airport and Base/Activity Airport to 'LAX'.
task_completion.visual_evidence: In the Flight Crew View Settings screen, under the expanded 'HOME & BASE AIRPORTS' section, both 'Home Airport' and 'Base/Activity Airport' fields display 'LAX'.

task_completion.description: The agent set Flight Crew View's battery usage to Unrestricted in Android Settings.
task_completion.visual_evidence: In the Android App Info/Battery settings for Flight Crew View, the 'Unrestricted' radio button is selected.

task_completion.description: The agent enabled Do Not Disturb mode on the Android device.
task_completion.visual_evidence: The Android Settings 'Do Not Disturb' screen shows it is turned on, or the DND icon (circle with a minus sign) is visible in the status bar.

task_completion.description: The agent added Flight Crew View as an exception to Do Not Disturb.
task_completion.visual_evidence: In the Android DND settings under 'Apps' or 'App exceptions', Flight Crew View is listed and allowed to interrupt.

task_completion.description: The agent sent the exact message 'Capt Rodriguez reporting for duty at LAX base' in the Crew Chat.
task_completion.visual_evidence: The Crew Chat screen shows the message 'Capt Rodriguez reporting for duty at LAX base' sent by the user.

task_completion.description: The agent returned to the Friends screen at the end of the task.
task_completion.visual_evidence: The final screenshot shows the 'Friends' screen of the Flight Crew View app.

integrity.description: The agent used the Android GUI to perform the tasks rather than terminal commands.
integrity.visual_evidence: Screenshots show navigation through the Flight Crew View app and Android Settings UI, not a terminal emulator or Termux.

integrity.description: The agent interacted with the actual Flight Crew View app and Android Settings.
integrity.visual_evidence: The UI matches standard Android Settings and the Flight Crew View app interface, not a text editor or web browser.

integrity.description: The chat message was typed into the actual Crew Chat interface.
integrity.visual_evidence: The message appears in the chat bubble format within the Flight Crew View app's Crew Chat screen, not just pasted into a random text field.

privileged_info_for_vlm: App: Flight Crew View (com.robert.fcView). Target Display Name: 'Capt. Rodriguez | LAX'. Target Position: 'Captain'. Target Airports: Both Home and Base/Activity airports must be 'LAX'. Target Chat Message: 'Capt Rodriguez reporting for duty at LAX base'. The Settings page in Flight Crew View is long; the 'HOME & BASE AIRPORTS' section must be tapped to expand and reveal the fields. Battery settings are found in Android Settings > Apps > Flight Crew View > Battery. DND settings are found in Android Settings > Sound > Do Not Disturb. Crew Chat is accessed via the hamburger menu in the app.
